title: Surgeon Vacancy at Zydus Lifesciences - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Zydus Lifesciences - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!
